title: InstCombine: Handle fptrunc in SimplifyDemandedFPClass
author: arsenm
description: Also handle llvm.fptrunc.round since it's the same.

tests.test_body:
declare nofpclass(nan inf zero sub pnorm) float @returns_nnorm_f32()

define nofpclass(inf pzero sub norm) half @nzero_demands_pnorm_source(i1 %cond, float %unknown) {
  %nnorm = call float @returns_nnorm_f32()
  %select = select i1 %cond, float %nnorm, float %unknown
  %result = fptrunc float %select to half
  ret half %result
}

declare nofpclass(inf zero sub norm) float @returns_nan_f32()

define nofpclass(nan) half @ret_no_nan__fptrunc__select_nan_or_unknown(i1 %cond, float %unknown) {
  %nan = call float @returns_nan_f32()
  %select = select i1 %cond, float %nan, float %unknown
  %result = fptrunc float %select to half
  ret half %result
}

declare nofpclass(ninf nzero nsub nnorm) float @returns_positive_or_nan_f32()

define nofpclass(nan pinf pzero psub pnorm) half @ret_no_positive_no_nan__fptrunc__select_positive_nan_or_unknown(i1 %cond, float %unknown) {
  %positive.or.nan = call float @returns_positive_or_nan_f32()
  %select = select i1 %cond, float %positive.or.nan, float %unknown
  %result = fptrunc float %select to half
  ret half %result
}

declare nofpclass(pinf pzero psub pnorm) float @returns_negative_or_nan_f32()

define nofpclass(nan ninf nzero nsub nnorm) half @ret_no_negative_no_nan__fptrunc__select_negative_nan_or_unknown(i1 %cond, float %unknown) {
  %negative.or.nan = call float @returns_negative_or_nan_f32()
  %select = select i1 %cond, float %negative.or.nan, float %unknown
  %result = fptrunc float %select to half
  ret half %result
}

declare nofpclass(zero sub norm) float @returns_inf_or_nan_f32()

define nofpclass(nan inf) half @ret_no_inf_no_nan__fptrunc__select_inf_or_nan_or_unknown(i1 %cond, float %unknown) {
  %inf.or.nan = call float @returns_inf_or_nan_f32()
  %select = select i1 %cond, float %inf.or.nan, float %unknown
  %result = fptrunc float %select to half
  ret half %result
}

declare nofpclass(nan inf zero sub nnorm) float @returns_pnorm_f32()

define nofpclass(inf nzero sub norm) half @pzero_demands_pnorm_source(i1 %cond, float %unknown) {
  %pnorm = call float @returns_pnorm_f32()
  %select = select i1 %cond, float %pnorm, float %unknown
  %result = fptrunc float %select to half
  ret half %result
}

declare nofpclass(nan zero sub norm) float @returns_inf_f32()

define nofpclass(inf) half @ret_no_inf__fptrunc__select_inf_or_unknown(i1 %cond, float %unknown) {
  %inf = call float @returns_inf_f32()
  %select = select i1 %cond, float %inf, float %unknown
  %result = fptrunc float %select to half
  ret half %result
}

declare nofpclass(nan inf nzero sub norm) float @returns_pzero_f32()

define nofpclass(pzero) half @ret_no_pzero__fptrunc__select_pzero_or_unknown(i1 %cond, float %unknown) {
  %pzero = call float @returns_pzero_f32()
  %select = select i1 %cond, float %pzero, float %unknown
  %result = fptrunc float %select to half
  ret half %result
}

declare nofpclass(nan inf pzero sub norm) float @returns_nzero_f32()

define nofpclass(nzero) half @ret_no_nzero__fptrunc__select_nzero_or_unknown(i1 %cond, float %unknown) {
  %nzero = call float @returns_nzero_f32()
  %select = select i1 %cond, float %nzero, float %unknown
  %result = fptrunc float %select to half
  ret half %result
}

declare nofpclass(nan pinf zero sub norm) float @returns_ninf_f32()

define nofpclass(ninf) half @ret_no_ninf__fptrunc__select_ninf_or_unknown(i1 %cond, float %unknown) {
  %ninf = call float @returns_ninf_f32()
  %select = select i1 %cond, float %ninf, float %unknown
  %result = fptrunc float %select to half
  ret half %result
}

declare nofpclass(nan inf zero sub) float @returns_norm_f32()

define nofpclass(sub norm) half @inf_demands_norm_source(i1 %cond, float %unknown) {
  %norm = call float @returns_norm_f32()
  %select = select i1 %cond, float %norm, float %unknown
  %result = fptrunc float %select to half
  ret half %result
}

declare nofpclass(nan pinf pzero psub pnorm) float @returns_negative_f32()

define nofpclass(ninf nzero nsub nnorm) half @ret_no_negative__fptrunc__select_negative_or_unknown(i1 %cond, float %unknown) {
  %negative = call float @returns_negative_f32()
  %select = select i1 %cond, float %negative, float %unknown
  %result = fptrunc float %select to half
  ret half %result
}

declare nofpclass(nan inf sub norm) float @returns_zero_f32()

define nofpclass(zero) half @ret_no_zero__fptrunc__select_zero_or_unknown(i1 %cond, float %unknown) {
  %zero = call float @returns_zero_f32()
  %select = select i1 %cond, float %zero, float %unknown
  %result = fptrunc float %select to half
  ret half %result
}

declare nofpclass(nan ninf zero sub norm) float @returns_pinf_f32()

define nofpclass(pinf) half @ret_no_pinf__fptrunc__select_pinf_or_unknown(i1 %cond, float %unknown) {
  %pinf = call float @returns_pinf_f32()
  %select = select i1 %cond, float %pinf, float %unknown
  %result = fptrunc float %select to half
  ret half %result
}

declare nofpclass(nan inf zero sub) float @returns_norm_f32()

define nofpclass(inf sub norm) half @zero_demands_norm_source(i1 %cond, float %unknown) {
  %norm = call float @returns_norm_f32()
  %select = select i1 %cond, float %norm, float %unknown
  %result = fptrunc float %select to half
  ret half %result
}

declare nofpclass(nan ninf nzero nsub nnorm) float @returns_positive_f32()

define nofpclass(pinf pzero psub pnorm) half @ret_no_positive__fptrunc__select_positive_or_unknown(i1 %cond, float %unknown) {
  %positive = call float @returns_positive_f32()
  %select = select i1 %cond, float %positive, float %unknown
  %result = fptrunc float %select to half
  ret half %result
}
